sections.title: System Architecture
sections.summary: Assessment inputs flow through calculation engines first, then presentation/view-model logic for pathway cards and summaries.

decisionConditions.title: Main Results Pipeline
decisionConditions.condition: computeResults(data) always computes tier, legacy EE eligibility, pathways, risk flags, and next steps from current AssessmentData.
decisionConditions.outcome: The result object includes both machine-facing eligibility structures and UI-facing cards/actions.
decisionConditions.failState: No hard fail state in orchestration; downstream engines carry pass/fail/needs_info statuses.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: Missing data is represented as needs_more_info in EE engines and as lower confidence in pathway/risk calculations.

sections.title: EE Overall Status
sections.summary: Legacy EE engine computes program-level statuses, then presentation mapping converts those statuses to UI labels.

decisionConditions.title: Legacy Overall Status Aggregation
decisionConditions.condition: If any of CEC/FSW/FST is eligible => overall eligible; else if any needs_more_info => overall needs_more_info; else ineligible.
decisionConditions.outcome: Legacy status drives whether Express Entry pathway card is eligible, needs info, or hidden.
decisionConditions.failState: overallStatus = ineligible when no program is eligible and no missing-data path remains.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: overallStatus = needs_more_info when at least one program is unresolved.

decisionConditions.title: Presentation Status Mapping
decisionConditions.condition: eligible -> eligible; needs_more_info -> low_eligibility; ineligible -> low_eligibility only for actionable soft-ineligible reasons without hard inadmissibility blockers, otherwise not_eligible.
decisionConditions.outcome: UI badge/status summary can show low_eligibility despite legacy ineligible when gaps are actionable.
decisionConditions.failState: Hard inadmissibility flags (criminal/medical/misrepresentation) force not_eligible presentation when overall status is ineligible.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: Missing fields are surfaced as low_eligibility with targeted next actions.

sections.title: EE Streams Orchestrator
sections.summary: Streams engine normalizes profile data, runs CEC/FSW/FST checks, and generates deduped follow-up questions from missing fields.

decisionConditions.title: Profile Normalization
decisionConditions.condition: AssessmentData is transformed to CandidateProfile with role-level fields (NOC/TEER/dates/hours/paid/employment/authorization/student flags), language metadata, and FST offer-employer array.
thresholds: FST employers capped to 2 in normalization output
decisionConditions.outcome: Program checks consume a consistent profile regardless of legacy vs new intake shape.
decisionConditions.failState: Invalid/incomplete normalized values cause program checks to return ineligible or needs_more_info.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: Unresolved fields are kept as empty/null sentinels and translated into explicit missingFields by each checker.

decisionConditions.title: Classification Output
decisionConditions.condition: checkCEC/checkFSW/checkFST run with same asOfDate; eligiblePrograms is the set of programs where status=eligible; nextQuestions are generated from union of missing fields.
decisionConditions.outcome: Single payload returns program cards, reasons, machine-readable missing fields, and dynamic follow-up prompts.
decisionConditions.failState: Programs with unmet thresholds return ineligible with reasons.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: Programs with unresolved required inputs return needs_more_info and missing field keys.

sections.title: CEC Logic
sections.summary: CEC requires qualifying Canadian skilled work, valid language, and 1,560 countable hours in a 3-year window.

decisionConditions.title: Quebec Intent Gate
decisionConditions.condition: If intentOutsideQuebec is unknown/not-sure => needs_more_info; if intentOutsideQuebec=no => ineligible.
decisionConditions.outcome: CEC only proceeds when intent is clearly outside Quebec.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible with reason: Express Entry requires intent to live outside Quebec.

decisionConditions.title: Role Completeness and Qualifying Filters
decisionConditions.condition: Canadian roles must have valid NOC/TEER/dates/hours/paid/employment/authorization/student/physical-in-Canada fields; qualifying roles require TEER 0-3, paid, employee, authorized=yes, student=no, physicallyInCanada=yes.
decisionConditions.outcome: Only compliant Canadian roles are counted toward CEC minimum hours.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible when no qualifying roles remain after CEC-specific exclusions.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info when any required role field is missing/unknown.

decisionConditions.title: Language + Hours Threshold
decisionConditions.condition: Language threshold is CLB7 all abilities if any qualifying TEER 0/1 role exists; otherwise CLB5 all abilities. Countable hours in last 3 years must be >=1560 with a 30-hour/week overlap cap.
decisionConditions.outcome: CEC status eligible only when both language validity and minimum hours pass.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible for expired/below-threshold language or insufficient hours.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info when language metadata/scores are missing or invalid test type/stream.

sections.title: FSW Logic
sections.summary: FSW enforces minimum requirements, continuity in a selected primary role, funds decisioning, and the 67-point grid.

decisionConditions.title: Required Data and Primary Occupation Selection
decisionConditions.condition: Skilled role identity fields, language metadata, and education/ECA data must be complete. If multiple skilled roles exist, fswPrimaryOccupationRoleId is required.
decisionConditions.outcome: FSW minimum check is anchored to one selected primary role and complete profile factors.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible when minimum conditions fail after data is complete.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info when any required factor or primary role selection is missing.

decisionConditions.title: Minimum Program Thresholds
decisionConditions.condition: Language must be valid and CLB7+, selected primary role must satisfy 1 continuous year and 1,560 hours in 10 years, and education must be at least secondary with valid ECA if foreign.
decisionConditions.outcome: Only candidates passing all minimums proceed to funds decision and 67 grid scoring.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible for language, continuity/hours, or education minimum failures.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info if any prerequisite data is incomplete.

decisionConditions.title: Funds Decision and 67-Point Grid
decisionConditions.condition: Funds requirement is exempt only when authorized to work in Canada and valid offer status supports exemption; otherwise funds family size + available CAD must be provided. Grid uses language, education, experience, age, arranged employment, adaptability; pass mark is 67.
decisionConditions.outcome: FSW eligible requires completed funds branch and score >=67.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible when final 67 score is below pass mark.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info for unresolved funds exemption facts, funds fields, spouse language, or spouse education when spouse is accompanying.

sections.title: FST Logic
sections.summary: FST requires eligible trade-NOC work history, language minimums, 3,120 hours in one eligible trade NOC, and a valid certificate or offer path.

decisionConditions.title: Trade Role Completeness and Eligibility
decisionConditions.condition: Role must include identity/work fields plus student and qualified-to-practice flags; eligible trade roles require paid=true, TEER 2/3, NOC in defined FST trade groups, student=no, qualifiedToPractice=yes.
decisionConditions.outcome: Only eligible trade roles are grouped by NOC for hour counting.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible when no eligible trade roles remain.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info when role details are incomplete.

decisionConditions.title: Language + Trade Hours Minimum
decisionConditions.condition: Language requires L/S >= CLB5 and R/W >= CLB4 with valid approved test within 2 years. Best single eligible trade NOC must reach 3,120 countable hours in the last 5 years.
decisionConditions.outcome: FST advances only when language and one-trade-NOC hour threshold are met.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible for language or minimum-hour failure.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info when language metadata/scores are incomplete.

decisionConditions.title: Offer/Certificate Path + Funds
decisionConditions.condition: Candidate must have either complete certificate details or at least one valid offer among up to two employers (paid=yes, fullTime=yes, continuous=yes, >=30 hours/week, >=12 months). Funds decision mirrors authorized+offer exemption logic.
decisionConditions.outcome: FST eligible only after qualifying offer/certificate path and resolved funds branch.
decisionConditions.failState: ineligible when neither qualifying certificate nor qualifying offer exists.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: needs_more_info for incomplete offer/certificate or unresolved funds fields.

sections.title: PNP Pathway Relevance
sections.summary: PNP in current implementation is pathway-card relevance logic tied primarily to stated immigration goal, not stream-level legal eligibility.

decisionConditions.title: PNP Card Inclusion
decisionConditions.condition: PNP card is added when primaryGoal is 'pr', 'work-permit', or 'not-sure'.
decisionConditions.outcome: PNP appears as a relevant pathway with generic why/next guidance.
decisionConditions.failState: No PNP card when goal is outside supported set.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: No explicit needs_more_info status; confidence decreases indirectly via input completeness.

sections.title: PNP Province Alignment
sections.summary: Province finder computes weighted alignment scores (0-100) for BC/AB/ON/SK/MB from questionnaire answers and ranks recommendations.

decisionConditions.title: Weighted Provincial Scoring
decisionConditions.condition: Each province profile applies multipliers over factors (employer support, tenure, wage, rural preference, education, funds, French, sector). Raw score is normalized by denominator 140 to 0-100.
decisionConditions.outcome: Returns sorted recommendation list with whyBullets, riskFlags, and whatToConfirmNext.
decisionConditions.failState: No strict fail/ineligible; outputs always produced for provided answers.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: Draft completion is validated separately; incomplete answers can still reduce factor points or trigger confirmation prompts.

sections.title: Audit Gaps
sections.summary: Critical logic not currently implemented is explicitly captured to prevent over-claiming deterministic eligibility coverage.

decisionConditions.title: PNP Base vs Enhanced
decisionConditions.condition: No deterministic classifier exists for base vs enhanced PNP stream determination.
decisionConditions.outcome: Current output is relevance + province alignment, not legal stream eligibility.
decisionConditions.failState: Cannot return base/enhanced status from current engines.
decisionConditions.missingDataState: No follow-up workflow exists in code to close this gap today.

decisionTrees.title: Input-to-Engine Architecture
decisionTrees.summary: Shows how saved assessment input flows through calculation engines and presentation layers.

nodes.label: computeResults()
nodes.detail: tier, pathways, risk flags, next steps

decisionTrees.title: EE Status Determination (Legacy + Presentation)
decisionTrees.summary: Legacy eligibility outcome is mapped to user-facing status with inadmissibility and soft-ineligible logic.

edges.label: legacy needs_info OR soft actionable ineligible

decisionTrees.title: Streams Classification Entry Flow
decisionTrees.summary: Step-10 flow from opening the questionnaire to persisted follow-up and instant reclassification.

decisionTrees.summary: CEC checks Quebec intent, Canadian skilled role validity, language threshold, and 1,560 countable hours.

nodes.label: Canadian work roles present and complete?

decisionTrees.title: FSW Decision Tree (Minimum + 67 Grid)

nodes.label: Intent outside Quebec known and yes?

nodes.label: If funds required, family size + funds entered?

nodes.label: Intent outside Quebec known and yes?

decisionTrees.title: PNP Base vs Enhanced Classification Gap
decisionTrees.summary: Explicitly marks that the app does not implement deterministic base/enhanced stream classification.

nodes.label: Classify candidate as PNP Base vs Enhanced?
Manual/legal review required for stream-level matching

assumptions.currentImplementation: Eligible only when countable Canadian qualifying work hours >= 1,560 in 3-year window.
assumptions.validationNote: Hour counting uses 30-hour/week cap and overlap suppression via normalizeWorkHours.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Requires one continuous countable year and >=1,560 skilled paid hours in 10-year window before scoring grid.
assumptions.validationNote: Continuity checked with contiguous-day streak and countable-hours threshold.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Requires >=3,120 countable skilled-trade hours in 5-year window.
assumptions.validationNote: Legacy skilled-trade detection depends on role.isSkilledTradeRole and TEER 2/3.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Language test validity is enforced at 2 years before asOfDate.
assumptions.validationNote: Expired tests are fail states; missing/invalid metadata can become needs_more_info.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Foreign-education ECA treated as valid when issue date is within 5 years and equivalency exists.
assumptions.validationNote: Missing/expired ECA fields typically route to needs_more_info.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Countable work is capped at 30 hours/week total, including overlap handling.
assumptions.validationNote: Concurrent jobs do not inflate countable hours above cap.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Unknown intent => needs_more_info; intent to live in Quebec => ineligible across CEC/FSW/FST.
assumptions.validationNote: Gate is applied at start of each stream checker.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Unapproved test type, wrong stream, or missing language metadata returns needs_more_info rather than CLB conversion.
assumptions.validationNote: Approved types are restricted to IELTS General, CELPIP General, TEF, TCF, PTE Core.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Decision = exempt/required/needs_more_info from authorized-work status + qualifying offer/funds-exempt flags; thresholds are not validated here.
assumptions.validationNote: Amount thresholds are out of scope in current implementation.

assumptions.currentImplementation: Not implemented. Current logic provides pathway relevance and province scoring, not legal stream-category classification.
assumptions.validationNote: Requires dedicated deterministic rules per province and stream family.

gaps.title: Base vs Enhanced PNP classification is not implemented
gaps.currentBehavior: PNP is surfaced as a pathway card plus province-alignment score shortlist without deterministic stream-category classification.
gaps.expectedBehavior: Given candidate profile + province-specific rules, classify or narrow Base vs Enhanced stream categories deterministically.
gaps.impact: Users and reviewers can over-interpret a province alignment score as legal stream eligibility; manual review remains required.
